title: tilia dasystyla subsp. multiflora
intro: Tilia dasystyla subsp. multiflora, also known as the silver linden tree, is a subspecies of deciduous tree native to Eastern Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Tilia dasystyla subsp. multiflora include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Tilia dasystyla subsp. multiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
